title: August 2nd, 2022
body:
#twitter feed

patrick sullivan (basicmountain):
the goal of policy is to produce certain outcome and what outcomes are desirable is purely a function of ideological priors. that’s why people disagree on policy. https://t.co/r7dhn7v7cv



https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1554156196793356290

j0efool (countj0ecool):
guys i have had one hell of a month



https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1554156172092903427

j0efool (countj0ecool):
tfw things are kiki where you wish they were bouba, and bouba where you wish they were kiki



https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1554153197689716736

christine (christineist):
🥹🥹🥹🥹🥹🥹🥹😭 friends making things for eachother, or making things inspired by eachother, is my favorite thing https://t.co/melogfdvdw



https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1554150785440657408

francisco ribeiro (fraveris):
their tears are filling up their glasses
no expression, no expression
hide my head, i wanna drown my sorrow
no tomorrow, no tomorrow

sunset sky - tom thomson, 1915 https://t.co/flolw4xspr



https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1554146658203713537

☯️ (chercher_ai):
being uncomfortable with comfort and comfortable with discomfort are both superpowers



https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1554141816693215232

nick redmark (9/100 διάλογος) (nickredmark):
what is your go-to move in a moment of mindfulness?



https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1554140512893943809

visa ✈️ sf (aug 2-14) (visakanv):
why does teaching 100 people chess get the whole village interested in chess? https://t.co/w2anzhjdmy



https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1554131291695890432

visa ✈️ sf (aug 2-14) (visakanv):
this guy c unnikrishnan saw a village where there was an alcohol problem. he taught 100 villagers to play chess. now basically the entire village plays chess

dominos meme, teach 100 students, introduce people to each other, create a scene https://t.co/jf1luw7f4w



https://twitter.com/i/web/status/1554130612457717761

lyrics

what i look like stickin to a plan that ain't workin
i got a hand to play ain't just here to put work in


battle lines lyrics

this is sparta
my sword it hit harder
when i swing through like i ain't a martyr
between me and you it's a whole lotta bodies
stacked up awkwardly
it ain't sweet, but that's part of me
please pardon me if i don't wait for you to reach and pass the baton to me
pray preach and pastor the psalms to me
break stride to [ask](ask) how you want what you want from me
when you ain't at or about what i wanna be
not in this economy
[bill](bill)'s due i do a different kind of me
and you ain't conning me
killer i kindly dare you to get off a me
but there you go again, watching me
scared
trying to understand so you can map the walk for me
and prepair
but i am not the feet you bought the shoes to fit
too grounded to confuse what the ground did with you saying i'm grounded cuz you misaccounted
here, lemme show you what i do with those i'm down with
and you can decide if you wanna dig or doubt it
it's nothin big about it
when i flow i'm a fountain
climb i'm countin
on the road i'm a wheel
steel spin as i come round the mountain
still sit still when i fill bounds in
feel holes so grateful that i found em
reel reckon reel so i film the whole encounter
take it from the top when i feel wound up
editing at least just to turn the sound up
so what's a short cut to preserve momentum
just a little nip/tuck before presentin
loose endings zipped up so no one's offended
at the untapped potential you had in the beginning
what i pictured in my mind's eye hit so different
why didn't you deliver the hits that i needed
to keep me in line
i can't tell where the beat is if you keep unwinding time
loosening the grip that i grab the reins with
loose lips sink ships and you just say shit
then think it flies cuz that's who you hang with
[every](every) single word a thicket of lies
tongue twistin lines thicker than thighs
flippin the bird cuz ya battered and fried
a bucket of chicken spittin
course i'm lappin it up, lickin my lips
thinkin bout the trouble i'm about to get in
cuz i haven't been eatin well
sleepin infrequent cuz the meat in my diet's distant
dying alone while the diners dig in
dissin the kitchen but refuse to pitch in
the finer the clientele, the wider the divider
the water the waiter waded through could swallow a nation
doggy paddle to make it through cuz butterflies are endangered
and i'm tired of the breast stroke


https://open.spotify.com/

no events scheduled for today!

possibilities

scratch paper

queries/todos

todone

amber told me about $2 movie at galaxy on thursday and alamo kids movies on some unknown day

got coffee for amber and me. morning walk was lovely and cool. still loving not carrying my phone and enjoying the wrinkles presented (even if it's wondering what would happen if amber needed to leave earlier)
